subject: fix(types): add missing Station fields to object constructors
body:
useStations.ts groupByStation() and station/[id].tsx fetchStation() were
constructing StationWithPrices objects without the new fields (suburb,
province, loyalty_programs, food_partners, convenience_partner, atm_banks,
payment_methods, truck_friendly, source_id) added to the Station interface.
This would cause TypeScript errors at compile time.

Tags: types, fix, bulk-import
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bulk-import
Semver: patch

title: add missing Station fields to object constructors
